selected_primary_method: normalized owner-cash capitalization with milestone-gated land-use options
rejected_averages: Do not average gross comparable NAV with owner-cash value.
Do not average contracted cash with uncontracted option success values.
Do not use consensus averaging to erase unresolved beneficiary, overlap, probability, timing, or capital differences.

disagreements.issue: No public executed Alpha Digital agreement discloses LB's net economics.
disagreements.resolution: unresolved; carried to tribunal and chair blocker

disagreements.issue: Probability, timing, and realization deductions drive much of the low/high spread.
disagreements.resolution: Retain explicit scenarios; do not collapse to a consensus point estimate.

disagreements.issue: Operating cash streams and asset/option NAV answer different questions.
disagreements.resolution: Use normalized owner-cash capitalization with milestone-gated land-use options and treat corroborating comparables only as cross-checks.
